🧪 Key findings from leverage study

  • Raising leverage_cap does nothing — ATR-risk sizing almost never exceeds ~2× leverage at 4h crypto. Cap is a dead parameter.
  • Per-sleeve leverage boosts hurt the blend — amplifies correlated drawdowns even when it helps per-sleeve Sharpe.
  • Inverse-vol weighting is a free lunch — same return, lower DD, higher Calmar.
  • Global BTC regime gate beats per-sleeve confidence gating — market regime more robust than signal strength.
  • Calmar-optimized aggressive sizing doubles CAGR but fails bootstrap MDD gate — satellite-only.
